ci_method: bootstrap OLS coef; 5-fold OOS guard; TF-IDF refit for construct-recoverability
verdict: THRESHOLD-BIASED (discrimination robust) — 'distilbert-base-uncased-finetuned-sst-2-english' separates the construct within each 'log_words' stratum (AUC 0.94/1.00) but the SCORE shifts with the confound (coef +0.11, 95% CI [0.026, 0.186]). At a fixed threshold the error rate swings ~16% across confound levels. a guard reduces the FP length-disparity -0.12->-0.06 but trades AUC 0.97->0.89 (5-fold OOS) — worth it only if length-fairness outweighs the AUC cost. Fix is a deployment threshold, not a retrain.
